---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for SquidSonar
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Describe the workflow visibility or operations problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the feature should work. Include the expected API, UI, or
example-app scenario.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, run states, workflow examples, or other context that would help
explain the feature request.
